title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 - 17 - 18: Rested and hung with mom.

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-Log. It's 12.30 a.m. on December 18th, so I guess I'll label this one as December 17th because I didn't do a video in the day.
Yesterday I didn't ride last night because I had to help my mom during the day, and then she wanted me to get up in the morning to help do Christmas shopping and stuff today.
Or yesterday, I guess.
So, and then I was going to ride yesterday afternoon, but I came back at like 3.30, and I was doing some file organizing.
I kind of got addicted to file organization.
I was doing it in my last ride for like the whole ride, and then I did it into the night, into that night.
Yeah, and then I was doing it yesterday, but then I passed out after like an hour of that.
I was going to do that a little bit and then ride, but I passed out, and then I woke up like not long ago, like a half hour ago.
And then I was laying in bed like, oh shit, you know, because this is my schedule.
I woke up.
That means I'm up.
I can't just force myself to go back to sleep, even though it's midnight.
I really wanted to go diurnal.
That's why I did ride yesterday.
I slept because I was going to try to get up in the morning and then ride yesterday and then sleep tonight.
And I did sleep, but it was on my own schedule.
I slept while I was trying to work in the afternoon, and then I woke up now.
I think I'm going to go on a ride now, and I'm stronger now.
The last time I went on the ride, like day before yesterday, or I guess day before, day before yesterday, now, I was beat at the end of the ride.
During the ride, I didn't feel very good.
I was starting to feel like I was burning muscle away, you know what I mean, damaging myself.
Now, um, and I feel better now.
My legs are still sore, but they're not, but they're only sore when I push on them.
They're not sore when I flex them.
So, I probably have more strength.
I haven't really been eating that much, though.
But, uh, yeah, I probably have more strength now than, than even when I did the 552.
I could probably, I would not be surprised if I could break 552 for 100 miles on this ride.
And if I can do it, I might try and go for 200 miles, because then I'll make up for yesterday.
And, yeah, 200, that's another benchmark.
Um, and I've been feeling, you know, not, not the last ride, but maybe the ride before that.
I was feeling like I had it in me to do more riding, you know.
So, yeah, maybe I could see if I could power out 200 miles in under 12 hours.
That's, that's a fun little benchmark, I think, to do, goal to have.
People should try to break, and I'd love to see, like, which riders can do it.
I'm gonna, I'm gonna go do a time trial and find out what level of 20k I am,
And I wonder if, you know, people of that same level can do it.
But, yeah, where you can, where you can break, let's see, what is it, um,
Six hours, 100 miles in six hours, so that would be 50 miles in three hours,
25 miles in an hour and a half, um, 200 miles in 12 mile, hours, um,
150 miles in 18 hours, and then 200, 400 miles in, um, 24 hours.
If you can break 400 miles in 24 hours on rollers, that's a benchmark.
I wonder if the people who, yeah, yeah, I'm sure, you know, I wonder how many people,
Like, can do that.
So, that would be a cool thing to do, like, on, um, I wonder if, I need to,
I actually have Zwift.
I haven't been on Zwift yet, because I've been too busy to just listen to music and stuff
And organizing files on my computer, but I want to get on Zwift, yeah, I want to see
If there, if the people have that, those, like, kind of, all kinds of records like that.
I know how the, there's, like, the Zwift one-time ride, some lady did, 1,100 miles, but, um,
What are the rules for that?
Like, how long can you take off between riding when you go take breaks and stuff?
Um, anyway, but, yeah, um, I guess that was, was that more than 400 miles in 24 hours?
Ah, it didn't look.
Anyways, um, so, uh, I'm gonna go ride now and, um, yeah, listen to music.
It's gonna be fun.
I just got really stoned.
Probably get stoned again right before my ride.
Alright, later.
